SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-09-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-09-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. CASES CSM-841719 AND CSM-841720 ARE RELATED CASES. BOTH CASES HEARD TOGETHER DURING THE 1:30 CALENDAR. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT(S). CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-09-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VIDAS, BORIS DBA  BV ELECTRIC IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GRIMALDI, ANN GRIMALDI, J. CHRISTOPHER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
